finding: `npm run validate:team-agents` completed successfully after running only the default lieutenant-escalation lane, while its name suggests the complete Team Agents suite. Focused three-provider coverage had to be invoked separately.
expectedBehavior: Rename the script to indicate smoke scope or make the default runner enumerate all deterministic Team cases; close evidence should not treat one default case as full-suite proof.
evidenceOrRepro: The command output contained only wave-mode setup and `ok (lieutenant-escalation)`; `three-vendor-direct-artifact-handoff` and `heterogeneous-multi-bot-team-run` required explicit `--case`.
followUp: Add a manifest-driven all-cases runner with paid/live cases explicitly excluded.
